nodes.label: A Google Photos–like Android App with Telegram as Storage Backend
nodes.norm_label: a google photos–like android app with telegram as storage backend

nodes.label: Appendix C — Recommended TDLib AAR Source
nodes.norm_label: appendix c — recommended tdlib aar source

nodes.label: Multi-level Photo Date Fallback Resolution
nodes.rationale: Screenshots, WhatsApp, Snapchat, and downloads lack EXIF DATE_TAKEN metadata. To ensure chronological gallery sorting, a multi-level fallback chain is resolved: EXIF date -> filename parsing -> filesystem creation/modification time -> MediaStore DATE_ADDED -> MediaStore DATE_MODIFIED.

nodes.label: WAL Checkpoint Truncation
nodes.rationale: To perform a safe binary copy of the database during backup, we execute wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) inside a Room transaction. This flushes the WAL logs and prevents copying a database file in an inconsistent state or with mismatching WAL/SHM states.

nodes.label: Pinch-to-Zoom Column Count Modifier
nodes.rationale: A custom pointerInput detector tracks pinch gestures. When zoom scale crosses thresholds, it dynamically modifies the grid columns (increasing on zoom-out, decreasing on zoom-in) to mirror premium gallery apps like Google Photos, utilizing haptics for transition feedback.

nodes.label: Destructive Migration Policy Review
nodes.rationale: fallbackToDestructiveMigration() is dangerous in production because missing migrations will wipe the user database. Explicit migrations must be defined.

nodes.label: Decouple UI from Backup Trigger
nodes.rationale: Backup was triggered directly from LaunchedEffect in UI, leading to concurrency issues. Should be triggered from VM/Repository with debounce.

nodes.label: Atomic Database Copy Locking
nodes.rationale: Copying database without write lock causes race conditions. Acquire transaction write lock during checkpoint and copy.

nodes.label: Stable Primary Key for Uploads
nodes.rationale: File path is unstable PK because paths change. Use stable MediaStore ID and unique fingerprint constraint.

nodes.label: Volatile File ID Refresh
nodes.rationale: Cached TDLib file IDs are volatile. Treat cached file ID as stale after 30 min and refresh from server if needed.

nodes.label: Fingerprint Formula Hardening
nodes.rationale: Original fingerprint formula used upload completion time, leading to false negatives. Use MediaStore dateTaken and MD5 of first 64KB.

nodes.label: Rolling Backup History
nodes.rationale: Deleting old backup immediately leaves user vulnerable to corruption. Keep a rolling window of last 3 backups.

nodes.label: Adaptive Flood Throttling
nodes.rationale: Fixed 5s delay is slow and doesn't handle FLOOD_WAIT. Use adaptive delay responding to Telegram FLOOD_WAIT errors.

nodes.label: Album Photo Schema Refactoring
nodes.rationale: Sharing a column for local paths and remote IDs is a design smell. Split into two nullable columns.

nodes.label: WakeLock Renewal Strategy
nodes.rationale: Static 1-hour WakeLock cut off large uploads. Renew the lock periodically instead.

nodes.label: Per-Photo Error Isolation
nodes.rationale: One failed photo should not fail the entire sync batch. Wrap individual uploads in try-catch and continue.

nodes.label: Post-Upload Checksum Verification
nodes.rationale: No integrity check after upload. Retrieve document size from Telegram to verify upload completeness.
